sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Bronstein, Gewirtz & Grossman, LLC Announces an Investigation Against AeroVironment, Inc. (AVAV) and Encourages Shareholders to Learn More About the Investigation
feed.summary: Bronstein, Gewirtz & Grossman, LLC has launched an investigation into AeroVironment, Inc. (AVAV) following significant drops in its stock price due to disappointing financial results and uncertainties surrounding a major government contract. The law firm is encouraging shareholders to join the investigation as the company reported substantial losses, reduced gross margins, and a goodwill impairment related to the U.S. Space Force's SCAR program.

feed.title: QatarEnergy-Exxon Golden Pass LNG starts production in Texas
feed.summary: The Golden Pass LNG joint venture between QatarEnergy and Exxon Mobil Corp. has begun liquefied natural gas production from its first train in Texas. This facility, located near the Texas-Louisiana border, is poised to become a significant source for U.S. LNG exports, with global exports from the 18 million tons per annum project expected to commence in the second quarter of this year. The project's completion is timely, given recent damage to Qatar's Ras Laffan facility.

feed.title: Costco sued over claims it raised prices, then sought tariff refunds from government
feed.summary: Costco is facing a proposed class action lawsuit in federal court over allegations that it raised prices on imported goods due to federal tariffs and then sought refunds for those same costs after the tariffs were ruled unlawful. The lawsuit claims that Costco will effectively 'double-dip' by benefiting from both increased prices paid by consumers and government refunds, without offering repayment to customers who paid the higher initial prices. Costco has stated that any refunds would be used to provide lower prices to future shoppers.

feed.title: Northern Trust stock hits 52-week low at $18.71 By Investing.com
feed.summary: Northern Trust Corp ADR stock has reached a 52-week low of $18.71, marking a challenging period for the company. Despite the decline, the stock offers a 6.24% dividend yield and is considered undervalued by InvestingPro, with a Fair Value of $24.74. The company has a strong record of maintaining dividend payments for 56 consecutive years, demonstrating financial resilience.

feed.title: Fifth Third Bancorp (NASDAQ:FITB) Given "Overweight" Rating at Piper Sandler
feed.summary: Piper Sandler has reaffirmed an "overweight" rating for Fifth Third Bancorp (NASDAQ:FITB), setting a new price target of $54.00, suggesting a potential upside of 21.01%. This follows several other analyst adjustments, resulting in a consensus "Moderate Buy" rating for the stock with an average price target of $56.84. The financial services provider's stock performance and institutional investor activity are also highlighted.

feed.title: Citigroup Increases Occidental Petroleum (NYSE:OXY) Price Target to $67.00
feed.summary: Citigroup has raised its price target for Occidental Petroleum (NYSE:OXY) to $67.00 from $45.00, maintaining a "neutral" rating on the stock. This new target suggests a potential upside of 1.25% from the company's previous close. The report also details other analyst revisions and institutional investment activity in OXY.

feed.title: H. B. Fuller (NYSE:FUL) Price Target Raised to $70.00 at Citigroup
feed.summary: Citigroup has raised its price target for H. B. Fuller (NYSE:FUL) to $70.00 from $67.00, affirming a "buy" rating on the specialty chemicals company's stock. This new target implies a potential upside of 17.19% from the current price. The article also details recent analyst ratings from other firms, H. B. Fuller's financial performance, and institutional holdings.

feed.title: Diamondback Energy (NASDAQ:FANG) Given New $230.00 Price Target at Citigroup
feed.summary: Citigroup has increased its price target for Diamondback Energy (NASDAQ:FANG) to $230.00 from $178.00, maintaining a "buy" rating. This new target suggests a potential upside of 16.14% from the stock's previous close of $198.03. Other analysts also recently updated their ratings and price targets, with the company currently holding an average "Buy" rating and a consensus price target of $199.29.

feed.title: Medical Waste Management Market to Reach $12.2 Billion Amid Rising Healthcare Waste Volumes
feed.summary: The medical waste management market is projected to grow from an estimated $9.2 billion in 2023 to $12.2 billion by 2028, exhibiting a CAGR of 5.9%. This growth is driven by increasing healthcare waste volumes, stringent government regulations, and advancements in waste management technologies. North America currently holds the largest share of the market, which is segmented by service, waste type, treatment site, and waste generator, with hospitals and diagnostic laboratories being key generators.

feed.title: SLB Ranked Among Top 50 Companies for High-Impact AI Inventions
feed.summary: SLB has been recognized among the top 50 companies for high-impact artificial intelligence (AI) inventions by Clarivate's AI50 benchmark. The company is lauded for its significant deployment of AI across its products, services, and workflows within the energy sector, distinguishing itself among technology leaders like NVIDIA and Siemens. This acknowledgement highlights SLB's commitment to advancing AI, particularly agentic AI, to enhance operational efficiency, risk control, and safety for its customers, evidenced by 212 AI-related patents since 2006.

feed.title: Vital Farms stock price target maintained at $24 by Morgan Stanley
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley has reiterated an "Equalweight" rating and a $24 price target for Vital Farms (NASDAQ:VITL) stock, despite the company's shares trading significantly below its 52-week high. The assessment follows meetings between analysts and the company's CFO, Thilo Wrede, and highlights issues such as scanner sales weakness, competitive promotional activity, and a social media controversy. Despite these challenges, Vital Farms shows financial stability with more cash than debt and liquid assets exceeding short-term obligations, and expects a new facility to open by mid-2027.

feed.title: MGM Resorts offers new all-inclusive option, including meals and entertainment!
feed.summary: MGM Resorts International is launching a new all-inclusive hotel experience at its Luxor Hotel & Casino and Excalibur Hotel & Casino properties in Las Vegas. This package bundles accommodation, dining, entertainment, attractions, and parking into one upfront price, starting at $330 plus tax for two people for two nights. The initiative aims to simplify planning and provide value for visitors to one of the country's most sought-after travel destinations.

feed.title: Jacobs wins awards on $4.9B Wisconsin infrastructure project
feed.summary: Jacobs has secured multiple design contracts for Wisconsin's I-39, I-90, and I-94 corridor modernization project, estimated to cost $4.9 billion. The Dallas-based contractor will initiate the design phase later this year, leading design efforts for a 67-mile stretch including the I-39, I-90, and I-94 system interchange. The comprehensive project involves interstate widening, interchange and bridge reconstruction, new interchanges, and flood reduction measures to improve mobility and commerce in Wisconsin.

feed.title: BFRG Stock More Than Doubled Today — What Is Fueling The Surge?
feed.summary: Bullfrog AI Holdings Inc. (BFRG) shares surged over 152% after announcing an agreement with a major global pharmaceutical company. This collaboration will utilize Bullfrog AI's bfLEAP program to identify and prioritize novel drug targets for major depressive disorder (MDD), aiming to accelerate drug discovery and clinical development. CEO Vin Singh views the agreement as a validation of Bullfrog AI's capabilities and anticipates expanding the partnership into other R&D areas.

feed.title: John Deere’s Austin testing center brings new tech to farming
feed.summary: John Deere has established a new 360-acre testing site in rural Austin, Texas, to develop and implement advanced agricultural technology. The facility, which opened in late 2022, works with local farmers to create innovations such as autonomous tractors and self-propelled sprayers. These technologies aim to enhance farmer productivity rather than replace jobs, fostering collaboration within Austin's tech community.

feed.title: NRG Energy Inc. Stock: Positioned for Energy Demand Growth Amid Valuation Debates and Strategic Expansions
feed.summary: NRG Energy Inc. is strategically positioned to capitalize on rising electricity demand driven by data centers and electrification, having expanded its generation capacity. Despite recent volatility and valuation debates, analysts are optimistic due to its strong business model, diversified energy portfolio, and proactive acquisitions. However, investors should monitor commodity price fluctuations, regulatory shifts, and debt levels to assess sustained value creation.

feed.title: A10 Networks Inc Stock: Application Delivery Leader in a Cloud-Driven Security Landscape
feed.summary: A10 Networks Inc (ATEN) is highlighted as a key player in application delivery and security solutions, crucial for modern cloud and hybrid environments. The article details its core business model, product portfolio including ADCs and security offerings, and competitive positioning within the cybersecurity market. It also discusses growth opportunities driven by cloud migration, 5G, and edge computing, making ATEN an attractive stock for North American investors seeking exposure to cybersecurity.

feed.title: Halliburton CEO Miller sells $6.34 million in stock
feed.summary: Halliburton CEO Jeffrey Allen Miller sold 158,455 shares of the company's common stock for $6.34 million, trading near its 52-week high after a 66% surge over the past year. Following the sale, Miller still directly owns over 1 million shares and holds options for additional stock. This transaction was part of a pre-arranged trading plan, and the company is also noted for recent achievements in automated well placement and positive analyst upgrades.

feed.title: Apollo Said to Near $10 Billion Deal for KKR’S Atlantic Aviation
feed.summary: Apollo Global Management Inc. is reportedly close to a deal to acquire Atlantic Aviation from KKR & Co. for nearly $10 billion. Apollo will partner with Singaporean sovereign wealth fund GIC Pte for a majority stake, while KKR plans to reinvest and maintain a significant interest in the private jet fixed-base operator.

feed.title: Stifel Nicolaus Cuts Bally's (NYSE:BALY) Price Target to $12.00
feed.summary: Stifel Nicolaus has adjusted its price target for Bally's (NYSE:BALY) from $18.00 to $12.00, while maintaining a "hold" rating, suggesting a potential upside of 28% from its current share price. This move aligns with a generally negative analyst sentiment, as the consensus for Bally's is "Reduce" with an average price target of $13.25, following similar reductions and sell ratings from other firms. The company's shares dropped 11.1% to $9.36, after reporting a significant quarterly loss, negative margins and ROE, and a high debt-to-equity ratio.

feed.title: Procter & Gamble (NYSE:PG) Price Target Lowered to $162.00 at Deutsche Bank Aktiengesellschaft
feed.summary: Deutsche Bank Aktiengesellschaft has lowered its price target for Procter & Gamble (NYSE:PG) to $162.00 from $171.00, while maintaining a "hold" rating, suggesting a potential upside of 12.04% from its previous close. This adjustment comes amidst recent insider selling, where executives, including CEO Gary A. Coombe, sold a significant number of shares totaling approximately $55.5 million over the past 90 days. Despite the reduced price target from Deutsche Bank, the company currently holds an average rating of "Moderate Buy" with an average target price of $167.83 from other analysts.

feed.title: Deutsche Bank Aktiengesellschaft Has Lowered Expectations for Monster Beverage (NASDAQ:MNST) Stock Price
feed.summary: Deutsche Bank Aktiengesellschaft has reduced its price target for Monster Beverage (NASDAQ:MNST) from $94 to $90, while maintaining a "buy" rating, indicating a potential upside of 26.2%. This adjustment follows Monster Beverage's strong Q4 performance, where it surpassed EPS and revenue estimates, with revenue growing 17.6% year-over-year. Institutional investors, including Norges Bank and Massachusetts Financial Services Co., have significantly increased their stakes, holding approximately 72.36% of the company's shares.

feed.title: Aura Biosciences (NASDAQ:AURA) Earns Buy Rating from HC Wainwright
feed.summary: HC Wainwright reissued a "Buy" rating for Aura Biosciences (NASDAQ:AURA) with a $22 price target, indicating a potential 250% upside. The company's Q1 earnings of ($0.37) per share surpassed estimates, but analysts still forecast a full-year loss. While insiders have recently sold shares, institutional investors and hedge funds hold a significant 96.75% ownership.

feed.title: J. M. Smucker (NYSE:SJM) Price Target Cut to $97.00 by Analysts at Deutsche Bank Aktiengesellschaft
feed.summary: Deutsche Bank Aktiengesellschaft has reduced its price target for J. M. Smucker (NYSE:SJM) from $117.00 to $97.00, maintaining a "hold" rating, which suggests a limited upside of 2.31% from the previous close. This adjustment comes despite the company reporting an earnings beat of $2.38 EPS on $2.34 billion revenue, as it still grapples with a negative net margin and a debt-to-equity ratio of 1.31. Analyst opinions are varied, with a consensus "Hold" rating and an average price target of $119.60, indicating a mixed outlook for the consumer staples stock.

feed.title: Kimberly-Clark stock hits 52-week low at 96.21 USD By Investing.com
feed.summary: Kimberly-Clark (KMB) stock has fallen to a 52-week low of $96.21, a 32.25% decrease over the past year, attributed to shifting consumer preferences and rising production costs. Despite this, InvestingPro suggests the stock is undervalued, offering a 5.19% dividend yield, and the company has consistently raised dividends for 53 years. Recent corporate news includes a Q4 2025 EPS beat, a pending UK antitrust review of a joint venture with Suzano, and a new Chief Information Officer appointment.

feed.title: Amentum quadruples Hawaii HQ to deepen Indo-Pacific military support
feed.summary: Amentum (NYSE: AMTM) has moved its Hawaii headquarters to a new, four-times larger facility in Honolulu, and established a Center for Contested Logistics. This expansion aims to enhance support for the U.S. Indo-Pacific Command (USINDOPACOM) by centralizing operations, accelerating solution development, and addressing critical challenges in modern warfare. The company manages over 1,000 employees across the Hawaiian Islands, supporting various key programs for USINDOPACOM.

feed.title: KeyCorp looks to recoup support lost for executive pay in 2025
feed.summary: KeyCorp is aiming to improve shareholder support for its executive compensation plan in 2025, following a loss of support. The article highlights this initiative by the company, led by CEO Christopher Gorman.

feed.title: AGO (NYSE: AGO) Form 144 shows multiple vested restricted stock grants
feed.summary: A recently filed Form 144 for Assured Guaranty Ltd (NYSE: AGO) details multiple grants of vested restricted stock, with various grant dates and share amounts. Key examples provided include grants of 17,425 shares on May 4, 2021; 10,949 shares on May 3, 2016; and 11,103 shares on May 2, 2017. The filing indicates these securities were issued by Assured Guaranty Ltd itself, with grant dates spanning up to May 1, 2024.

feed.title: Short Interest in Banco Bradesco SA (NYSE:BBDO) Declines By 18.0%
feed.summary: Banco Bradesco SA (NYSE:BBDO) experienced an 18.0% decline in short interest during March, with the total falling to 144,188 shares. The bank's stock was trading at $3.14, with a market capitalization of $33.27 billion, and recently announced a monthly dividend of $0.0518 per share. Several institutional investors, including Franklin Resources Inc. and O Shaughnessy Asset Management LLC, have significantly increased their holdings in the company.

feed.title: Akso Health Group (NASDAQ:AHG) Sees Strong Trading Volume - Here's What Happened
feed.summary: Akso Health Group (NASDAQ:AHG) experienced unusually strong trading volume on Monday, with 137,008 shares traded, a 157% increase from the previous session. Despite this, the stock was trading down approximately 2.5% intraday at $2.366, and analysts maintain a consensus "Sell" rating. Institutional ownership remains low at 1.21%, although SmartHarvest Portfolios LLC recently acquired 16,748 shares.

feed.title: Expedia Group, Inc. (NASDAQ:EXPE) Sees Large Decline in Short Interest
feed.summary: Expedia Group (NASDAQ:EXPE) experienced an 18.3% decline in short interest during March, with 6.7 million shares shorted as of March 13th. Insider Robert J. Dzielak sold over 8,000 shares, reducing his stake by 7.43%. Institutional investors significantly increased their holdings, while analysts maintained a consensus "Hold" rating with an average target price of $282.77.

feed.title: GitLab, Samsara, Intuit, Workday, and Autodesk Shares Skyrocket, What You Need To Know
feed.summary: Shares of GitLab, Samsara, Intuit, Workday, and Autodesk saw significant jumps after President Trump indicated productive talks with Iran, easing Middle Eastern tensions. This positive geopolitical news, combined with investors buying the dip in high-quality SaaS stocks after a recent correction, led to an afternoon rally for these companies. Workday, specifically, experienced a 4.1% jump but remains down 37.8% year-to-date and 53.4% below its 52-week high, following concerns about AI's impact on enterprise software.

feed.title: DuPont de Nemours Stock: Water Tech Milestone in Kenya Highlights Core Strengths for Investors
feed.summary: DuPont de Nemours (NYSE: DD) recently commissioned a significant multi-technology water treatment plant in Kampi Ya Samaki, Kenya, providing clean water to 20,000 people. This project, utilizing DuPont's advanced ultrafiltration and reverse osmosis technologies, underscores the company's leadership in sustainable solutions and its strong position in the materials science sector. For investors, this initiative highlights DuPont's reliable products, commitment to ESG principles, and growth potential in addressing global water scarcity despite facing risks like commodity price fluctuations and intense competition.

feed.title: Moody's Corp Stock: Dominant Position in Credit Ratings Amid Evolving Financial Markets
feed.summary: Moody's Corp maintains a leading position in credit ratings and analytics, crucial for global investors, particularly in North America. The company's business model relies on both Moody's Ratings (MR) and Moody's Analytics (MA), providing a resilient revenue stream. With strong market tailwinds, Moody's offers North American investors exposure to essential financial infrastructure, though regulatory scrutiny and market cyclicality remain potential risks.

feed.title: Western Digital, Photronics, Nova, FormFactor, and Amkor Stocks Trade Down, What You Need To Know
feed.summary: Several semiconductor-related stocks, including Western Digital, Photronics, Nova, FormFactor, and Amkor, experienced declines following rising geopolitical tensions from the Iran war. Concerns about potential disruptions to critical supply chains, particularly the availability of essential gases like helium for semiconductor manufacturing, led to a broader market downturn. This uncertainty and fear of cascading effects across the tech industry caused a sell-off in these stocks.

feed.title: AudioCodes Files 2025 Form 20-F With U.S. SEC
feed.summary: AudioCodes Ltd. has filed its annual Report on Form 20-F for the fiscal year ended December 31, 2025, with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission. This filing, announced on March 30, 2026, makes the audited 2025 financial statements available to investors, ensuring transparency and compliance with U.S. reporting requirements for foreign private issuers. The company, an enterprise voice and VoiceAI solutions provider, aims to support informed assessment of its performance in the competitive market.

feed.title: Kroger to add second store in Taylor
feed.summary: Kroger plans to construct a second store in Taylor, Michigan, renovating a former Bed, Bath and Beyond location at 23869 Eureka. This new 114,000-square-foot store is expected to open in early 2027, representing a $27.5 million investment. The existing Kroger at 7000 Monroe Blvd., which recently underwent an $8.8 million remodel, will remain open.

feed.title: Is Waste Management (WM) the Best Safe Stock to Buy Amid Market Volatility?
feed.summary: Waste Management (WM) is presented as a safe stock due to its defensive, non-discretionary business model, high customer retention, and strong revenue stability. The article highlights its durable moat, pricing power, and transition into renewable energy as key growth drivers. However, the author suggests that certain AI stocks might offer higher returns in a shorter timeframe.

feed.title: Banco Bilbao Vizcaya Argentaria S.A. Stock: A Strategic Overview for North American Investors Seekin
feed.summary: This article provides a strategic overview of Banco Bilbao Vizcaya Argentaria S.A. (BBVA) for North American investors, highlighting its significant operations in emerging markets and its focus on digital innovation and sustainable finance. BBVA offers diversification through its presence in Latin America and Turkey, appealing to investors seeking global banking exposure away from U.S. market concentration. The bank's consistent dividend policies and adherence to Basel III requirements also make it attractive to income-focused investors.

feed.title: New BBVA Argentina (NYSE: BBAR) director files Form 3 ownership report
feed.summary: Banco BBVA Argentina S.A. (NYSE: BBAR) director De Cristobal De Nicolas Lorenzo has filed a Form 3, an initial insider ownership report with the SEC. This filing officially designates him as a reporting insider for the company. The report indicates no share purchases, sales, or other transactions at this initial stage.

feed.title: Seagate, Applied Materials, KLA Corporation, Lam Research, and MACOM Stocks Trade Down, What You Need To Know
feed.summary: Shares of Seagate, Applied Materials, KLA Corporation, Lam Research, and MACOM experienced declines due to rising geopolitical tensions stemming from the Iran war. These tensions threaten critical supply chains for essential gases like helium, vital for semiconductor manufacturing, potentially impacting production for major chip fabricators. The market downturn reflects concerns over these disruptions affecting the broader tech industry and leading to increased costs for chipmakers.

feed.title: Banco BBVA Argentina (BBAR) adds officer Leandro Alvarez as insider
feed.summary: Banco BBVA Argentina (BBAR) has filed a Form 3, an initial statement of beneficial ownership, for Leandro Alvarez, who has been appointed as Director Engineering & Data. This filing establishes Alvarez as a reporting insider for future disclosures but indicates no stock transactions or holdings at this time. The Form 3 clarifies his role as an officer and sets up his obligation to report any subsequent equity transactions to regulators.

feed.title: Biogen Stock Pops After FDA Approves New High-Dose Spinraza For Spinal Muscular Atrophy
feed.summary: Biogen's stock surged after the FDA approved a new high-dose regimen for Spinraza, a treatment for spinal muscular atrophy (SMA), which has also received approvals in the EU, Switzerland, and Japan. The approval is supported by Phase 2/3 DEVOTE study results showing significant improvements in motor function. Additionally, Biogen shared promising Phase 2 data for litifilimab in cutaneous lupus erythematosus, signaling potential for a new targeted therapy.

feed.title: BMO Highlights Alaska Air Group, Inc. (ALK) Earnings Expansion Potential Despite Fuel Cost Uncertainty
feed.summary: BMO Capital has initiated coverage on Alaska Air Group (ALK) with an Outperform rating and a $50 price objective, citing long-term earnings expansion potential. The firm highlights strategic plans including the integration of Hawaiian Airlines and debt reduction efforts. Additionally, Alaska Air Group extended its naming rights agreement with the University of Washington for the Alaska Airlines Arena for another 10 years, reinforcing community ties and supporting student-athletes.

feed.title: 8 Information Technology Stocks With Whale Alerts In Today's Session
feed.summary: This article highlights eight information technology stocks that have shown significant "whale alerts" — large options trades — during today's trading session. These alerts signify unusual options activity that can indicate potential trading opportunities as they suggest a divergence from normal option valuations. The article details specific put and call options trades for companies like NVIDIA, BitMine Immersion Technologies, Cloudflare, Teradyne, ServiceNow, ASML Holding, Celestica, and Marvell Technology, including their expiration dates, strike prices, and sentiment.

feed.title: Himax, Teradyne, Entegris, IPG Photonics, and Universal Display Shares Plummet, What You Need To Know
feed.summary: Shares of Himax, Teradyne, Entegris, IPG Photonics, and Universal Display fell in the afternoon session due to rising geopolitical tensions stemming from the Iran war, which threatens critical supply chains. The conflict particularly impacts the supply of essential gases like helium, vital for semiconductor manufacturing, causing concerns for major chip fabricators and cascading effects across the tech industry. This uncertainty has contributed to a broader market downturn, pushing the Nasdaq into correction.

feed.title: US resin shippers look to tap new customers amid Iran war
feed.summary: US resin exports have increased due to disruptions in Middle East plastics supply caused by the Iran war. While North American producers are operating at high capacity, the sustainability of this export demand depends on the conflict's duration and global pricing. European buyers are likely to see increased U.S. resin imports first due to shorter shipping times and favorable pricing arbitrage compared to Asia.

feed.title: For $7, KFC packs nuggets, fries and a drink into new meal boxes
feed.summary: KFC has launched a new "Value Feast" lineup, featuring three "Box Feasts" priced from $7 to $11, in a strategic move to offer visible abundance and perceived value amidst rising costs. These boxes include boneless chicken items, fries, and a medium drink, targeting individual customers with complete meal solutions. The company is supporting this launch with a national advertising campaign highlighting the generous portions.

feed.title: Maryland American Water and the American Water Charitable Foundation Provide $196,000 to Support Communities in 2025
feed.summary: Maryland American Water and the American Water Charitable Foundation together provided $196,000 to 54 organizations in 2025, aligning with their "Keep Communities Flowing" initiative. Employees also contributed through volunteering and a matching gift program. This funding supports community projects focusing on water, people, and communities, continuing the Foundation's over $25 million investment since 2012.

feed.title: Arthur J. Gallagher (AJG) Stock Trades Up, Here Is Why
feed.summary: Shares of Arthur J. Gallagher (AJG) rose 3.8% after the company announced the acquisition of International Insurance Brokers Pty Ltd. This acquisition is set to strengthen AJG's retail brokerage capabilities and niche expertise in Australia. Despite this positive movement, the stock is down 15.9% year-to-date, partly due to investor concerns about AI-driven disintermediation in the insurance brokerage sector.
